title: Chest X-Ray Interpretation: A Systematic Approach for Medical Students and Residents
summary: A practical approach to reading chest X-rays using AP vs PA film assessment, the RIPE quality checklist, and the ABCDE interpretation framework.

title: Diarrhea: Practical Approach to Acute and Chronic Diarrhea
summary: A practical resident-level approach to acute and chronic diarrhea including who needs testing, stool studies, empiric antibiotics, antimotility agents, chronic diarrhea subtypes, and first-pass workup.

title: EKG Interpretation: A Systematic Approach for Medical Students and Residents
summary: A practical systematic guide to EKG interpretation using rate, rhythm, axis, intervals, and morphology, including ischemia, hypertrophy, electrolyte abnormalities, arrhythmias, AV blocks, bundle branch blocks, and classic board findings.

title: How to Be a Great Senior Resident: Practical Guide to Team Leadership
summary: A practical guide for PGY-2 and senior residents on leading a team, supporting interns, setting expectations, teaching effectively, giving feedback, and building a healthy team culture.

title: Iron Deficiency: Practical Approach to Diagnosis and Replacement
summary: Practical guide to diagnosing iron deficiency, distinguishing anemia of chronic disease, choosing oral versus IV iron, dosing iron replacement, avoiding common mistakes, and follow-up monitoring.

title: Lymphoma vs Leukemia: A Practical Resident Guide
summary: A practical framework for understanding lymphoma versus leukemia, including Hodgkin lymphoma, non-Hodgkin lymphoma, ALL, AML, APML, CLL, CML, diagnosis, staging, treatment principles, and high-yield board pearls.

title: Pressure Ulcers and Sacral Wounds: Practical Inpatient Management
summary: A practical inpatient approach to chronic pressure ulcers and sacral decubitus wounds including wound staging, nutrition, debridement, chronic osteomyelitis, antibiotics, surgical consultation, and discharge planning.

title: Abdominal Pain: Practical Inpatient Approach to GERD, Gastritis, Gas, and Dyspepsia
summary: A practical inpatient approach to low-risk abdominal pain focused on GERD, gastritis, esophagitis, gas, bloating, antacids, H2 blockers, PPIs, sucralfate, simethicone, and GI cocktails.

title: Alcohol Withdrawal Syndrome: Recognition, Treatment, and Relapse Prevention
summary: A practical guide to alcohol withdrawal syndrome including recognition, timing of symptoms, CIWA scoring, benzodiazepine therapy, phenobarbital, delirium tremens, and alcohol cessation medications.

title: Anticoagulation Basics: Practical Guide to DVT Prophylaxis and Therapeutic Anticoagulation
summary: Practical inpatient guide to anticoagulation including DVT prophylaxis, therapeutic anticoagulation, DOAC selection, heparin drips, LMWH dosing, obesity adjustments, and choosing between apixaban and rivaroxaban.

title: Bowel Regimen: Practical Inpatient Approach to Constipation
summary: A practical inpatient guide to constipation management including first-line bowel regimens, escalation strategies, opioid-induced constipation, and management of severe constipation.

title: Cellulitis: Cefazolin vs Vancomycin and IV vs Oral Antibiotics
summary: Practical approach to cellulitis including MRSA assessment, cefazolin versus vancomycin, IV versus oral antibiotics, treatment duration, and common pitfalls.

title: Cough: Practical Inpatient Approach
summary: Practical inpatient guide to cough management including benzonatate, guaifenesin, dextromethorphan, supportive therapies, chronic cough evaluation, GERD, asthma, and common inpatient treatment strategies.

title: DVT and Pulmonary Embolism: Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents
summary: Resident-level guide to DVT and pulmonary embolism including diagnosis, Wells score, PERC criteria, PE classification, anticoagulation, thrombolysis, and provoked versus unprovoked VTE.

title: Electrolyte Repletion: Practical Guide to Potassium, Magnesium, Calcium, and Phosphate Replacement
summary: Practical inpatient guide to potassium, magnesium, calcium, and phosphate replacement including dosing, indications, formulas, common pitfalls, and evidence behind electrolyte goals.

title: SGLT2 Inhibitors and Euglycemic DKA: A Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents
summary: Resident-level guide to why SGLT2 inhibitors cause euglycemic diabetic ketoacidosis, including glucosuria, insulin-glucagon physiology, lipolysis, ketogenesis, risk factors, diagnosis, and management.

title: Headache in the Hospital: A Practical Inpatient Approach
summary: A practical inpatient approach to headache evaluation and treatment including red flags, migraine cocktails, anti-dopaminergic therapy, magnesium, triptans, and common pitfalls.

title: Insulin Regimen: Practical Inpatient Approach
summary: A practical inpatient guide to insulin regimens including glucose targets, basal-bolus dosing, correction insulin, titration, outpatient medication management, NPO adjustments, hypoglycemia safety, steroid hyperglycemia, and the rule of 1800.

title: Landmark Clinical Trials Every Internal Medicine Resident Should Know
summary: A high-yield review of the most important landmark clinical trials across Internal Medicine, Critical Care, Cardiology, Endocrinology, Nephrology, Pulmonary, and Infectious Diseases.

title: Pain Regimen: Practical Inpatient Approach
summary: A practical inpatient guide to pain control including acetaminophen, NSAIDs, topical agents, opioids, neuropathic pain medications, methadone, ketamine, buprenorphine, and post-operative pain management.

title: Acute Pancreatitis: Diagnosis, Management, and Complications
summary: Practical approach to acute pancreatitis including diagnosis, causes, fluid resuscitation, nutrition, severity assessment, and complications.

title: Acute Liver Injury: Practical Approach to Undifferentiated Liver Test Abnormalities
summary: A practical resident-level guide to undifferentiated liver injury including acute liver failure, hepatic encephalopathy, hepatocellular versus cholestatic patterns, R factor, common causes, diagnostic workup, and board-style pearls.

title: COPD and Asthma: Acute Exacerbations, Maintenance Therapy, GOLD 2023 Updates, and Board Review
summary: Comprehensive resident-level review of COPD and asthma including acute exacerbation management, oxygen targets, GOLD 2023 recommendations, inhaler selection, pulmonary function testing, mortality-reducing therapies, roflumilast, chronic azithromycin, and board-style teaching pearls.

title: High-Yield Internal Medicine Pearls from the Wards
summary: A high-yield collection of internal medicine pearls from the wards covering cryptococcal meningitis, Cushing syndrome, MAC, dyspnea, methemoglobinemia, lumbar puncture complications, liver disease, vasculitis, hypoglycemia, angioedema, neurostorming, and more.

title: High-Yield Internal Medicine Pearls from the Wards: Electrolytes, Vasculitis, TB, Cirrhosis, and More
summary: A high-yield collection of internal medicine ward pearls covering hypokalemia, post-strep glomerulonephritis, medication-assisted treatment, methadone, vasculitis, TB testing, ascites, cirrhosis, hypoglycemia, neurologic weakness, and more.

title: Acute Kidney Injury (AKI): A Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents
summary: Resident-level guide to acute kidney injury including AKI definitions, prerenal, intrinsic, and postrenal causes, urine microscopy, FENa interpretation, ATN, AIN, glomerulonephritis, and practical inpatient evaluation.

title: Cardiomyopathy: A Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents
summary: Resident-level guide to cardiomyopathy including dilated, hypertrophic, restrictive, arrhythmogenic, stress-induced, ischemic, infiltrative, toxic, metabolic, and inflammatory causes.

title: Cirrhosis: A Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents
summary: Resident-level guide to cirrhosis using the VIBES framework: volume, infection, bleeding, encephalopathy, screening, plus hepatorenal syndrome, hepatopulmonary syndrome, portopulmonary hypertension, and hepatic hydrothorax.

title: DKA and HHS: A Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents
summary: Resident-level guide to DKA and HHS including diagnosis, key differences, initial workup, precipitating causes, fluids, insulin, potassium, bicarbonate, anion gap closure, and transition from insulin drip to basal-bolus insulin.

title: Heart Failure: A Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents
summary: Resident-level guide to heart failure including signs and symptoms, HFrEF vs HFpEF, ejection fraction cutoffs, guideline-directed medical therapy, diuresis, ICD, CRT, iron replacement, and note documentation.

title: Respiratory Viral Panels (RVPs): When Should We Order Them?
summary: Evidence-based review of respiratory viral panels, their clinical utility, limitations, costs, and appropriate indications in hospitalized patients.

title: Shock: The Complete Resident Guide
summary: Resident-level guide to shock including hypovolemic, distributive, cardiogenic, and obstructive shock, hemodynamic profiles, cardiac output, SVR, mixed venous oxygen saturation, wedge pressure, and treatment strategies.

title: Syncope: A Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents
summary: Resident-level guide to syncope including vasovagal syncope, orthostatic hypotension, cardiogenic syncope, orthostatic vital signs, red flags, telemetry, EKG evaluation, and the San Francisco Syncope Rule.

title: Ventricular Tachycardia Management: A Practical Guide for Residents
summary: Resident-level guide to ventricular tachycardia management including non-sustained VT, sustained VT, stable vs unstable VT, antiarrhythmics, cardioversion, PVC burden, VT storm, and incessant VT.

title: Wide Complex Tachycardia: VT vs SVT With Aberrancy
summary: Resident-level guide to evaluating wide complex tachycardias including VT versus SVT with aberrancy, Brugada criteria, AV dissociation, capture beats, fusion beats, concordance, and ECG interpretation pearls.

title: Acid-Base Disorders: ABG, VBG, Anion Gap, Compensation, and Delta-Delta Guide
summary: Resident-level guide to acid-base disorders including ABG/VBG interpretation, primary disorder identification, anion gap calculation, albumin correction, NAGMA vs HAGMA, osmolar gap, Winter

title: Acute Coronary Syndrome (ACS): STEMI, NSTEMI, Unstable Angina Guide
summary: Resident-level guide to Acute Coronary Syndrome including STEMI, NSTEMI, unstable angina, ECG interpretation, troponins, risk stratification, PCI vs CABG, and guideline-based management.

title: Atrial Fibrillation: The Complete Resident Guide
summary: Comprehensive resident-level review of atrial fibrillation including ECG diagnosis, stroke prevention, anticoagulation, rate versus rhythm control, AF with RVR, antiarrhythmics, cardioversion, and board pearls.

title: Hyponatremia: The Complete Resident Guide
summary: Resident-level guide to hyponatremia including serum osmolality, volume status, urine sodium, urine osmolality, SIADH, hypovolemic and hypervolemic causes, and safe correction strategies.

title: ICU Pressors, Sedation, Analgesia, and Paralysis: The Complete Resident Guide
summary: Resident-level ICU guide to vasopressors, inotropes, sedation, analgesia, RASS goals, and neuromuscular blockade with practical dosing, side effects, and bedside decision-making.

title: Mechanical Ventilation in the ICU
summary: High-yield review of mechanical ventilation, ventilator modes, ARDS, ventilator settings, weaning, extubation, and ICU management.

title: Pneumonia: A Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents
summary: Resident-level guide to pneumonia including CAP, HAP, VAP, antibiotic selection, MRSA and Pseudomonas risk factors, aspiration pneumonia, diagnostic testing, treatment duration, vaccination, and common clinical pitfalls.

title: Practice-Changing Updates in Internal Medicine (2025–2026)
summary: Resident-focused review of recent guideline updates and high-impact studies affecting hospital medicine, including acute MI transfusion thresholds, complicated UTI duration, CAP updates, AI in medicine, hypertonic saline in heart failure, ultrasound-guided lumbar puncture, automated ventilator weaning, lithium and Alzheimer disease, SSRI-associated hyponatremia, and neuroimmunology.

title: Running a Code Blue: A Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents
summary: Resident-focused guide to running a Code Blue, including ACLS fundamentals, CPR quality, shockable and non-shockable rhythms, medication timing, team roles, H

title: Urinary Tract Infections: A Practical Guide for Internal Medicine Residents
summary: A practical resident-level guide to urinary tract infections, including simple cystitis, complicated UTI, pyelonephritis, inpatient and outpatient antibiotics, urinalysis interpretation, asymptomatic bacteriuria, catheter-associated UTI, recurrent UTI, and resistant organisms.
